description: Expected cost ranges for sam-simple.yaml at default usage (300K req/month, us-east-1)

dynamodb.notes: PAY_PER_REQUEST with 1 GSI. Includes storage at $0.25/GB and GSI write replication.

secrets_manager.notes: 1 secret ($0.40/mo) + API calls ($0.05/10K). API call volume depends on caching.

cloudwatch_logs.notes: 3 functions × 100MB ingestion. Storage compounds if retention=Never.

cost_accuracy: Lambda line item exists with 3 functions
DynamoDB GSI write cost included (write cost multiplied by 1 + num_GSIs)
API Gateway identified as REST type
Secrets Manager line item includes both per-secret and API call costs
CloudWatch Logs flagged as HOTSPOT or has retention=Never warning
Data transfer line item present for API Gateway egress
All Lambda functions detected as arm64 architecture
workflow_classification: DailyReportFunction classified as BACKGROUND (inferred from Scheduler::Schedule)
usage_data_flow: Phase 4 offers three options: describe traffic (A), provide numbers (B), or fetch CloudWatch (C)
Path A infers per-service usage from a natural language traffic description with reasoning shown
Path B shows baseline values with a Derivation column explaining where each default comes from
Inferred values are tagged as (inferred) in the cost output
User-provided values are tagged as (user) in the cost output
CloudWatch actuals are tagged as (actual) in the cost output
Baseline defaults are tagged as (baseline) in the cost output
Baseline derivation rules derive from template config (e.g. avg duration = 50% of Timeout)
Confidence levels: HIGH for CloudWatch, MEDIUM for inferred/user-provided, LOW for all baselines
markdown_report: cost-estimate.md file is created in the project directory
Report contains ## Summary section with estimated total and confidence range
Report contains ## Cost Breakdown section as a markdown table with Service, Monthly Cost, % of Total columns
Report contains ## Assumptions section as a markdown table with Source column (actual/user/default)
Report contains ## Per-Workflow Costs section with User-Facing, Async, and Scheduled subsections
Report contains ## Storage Growth section with Month 1/3/6/12 rows
Report contains ## Optimizations section with at least one recommendation including a code fix
Report ends with disclaimer linking to calculator.aws
